configurations.name: without_skill
configurations.notes: One test failed due to rate limit error

analyst_observations.observation: PDD skill significantly improves PM-first philosophy adherence. All with_skill outputs start with user pain points and business value, while baseline outputs jump to technical implementation.
PDD skill ensures Chinese PRD format is followed. with_skill outputs include proper Chinese sections (用户故事, 验收标准, 商业价值) while baseline outputs are technical English documents.
Value Score Framework is unique to PDD skill. Only with_skill outputs calculate quantitative value scores using the formula: (User × 0.4) + (Business × 0.4) + (Technical × 0.2).
PDD skill takes ~37 seconds longer on average but produces significantly more comprehensive output (3,745 tokens vs 288 tokens for failed baseline).
All 4 assertions per eval pass with skill (100%) vs 42% without skill, showing strong discriminative power.
